title: Mildly Golden Apples
description: Changes the recipe for golden apples to be more attainable. Useful for curing lots of zombie villagers ⊂(◉‿◉)つ
body: ### Unfortunately support for the program I used to create this mod has been terminated, so I will be unable to update/continue working on it. ### If any mod devs would like to take over the project, please contact me on Discord! [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ) # Mildly Golden Apples - Changes golden apple recipe from gold ingots to nuggets - frees up your gold to use with my other mod. - makes curing lots of zombie villagers more affordable ## Compatibility * has only been tested with 1.20.4
